summary: Preserve real poll-loop error in predict-sweep and compare-routes.
reason: When GetNoCache fails during search-result polling, the error was already stored in r.Error/res.Error before breaking out of the loop. The subsequent empty-flights guard overwrote it with a generic 'no flights found' message, making API/network failures indistinguishable from genuine no-availability results. Added an empty-string guard so the root-cause error is preserved.
validated_outcome: A poll-phase network or API error surfaces as the real error string; 'no flights found' is only emitted when no error occurred and the result is genuinely empty.
